---
title: "IBD Omics Explorer"
subtitle: "A curated registry of publicly available inflammatory bowel disease omics datasets"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<div class="hero-wrap">
<span class="hero-badge">Dataset Registry</span>

## IBD Omics Explorer

<p class="hero-subtitle">A curated, searchable inventory of publicly available omics datasets from inflammatory bowel disease research — across bulk transcriptomics, single-cell transcriptomics, spatial transcriptomics, proteomics, metabolomics, methylation, microbiome, and genetics.</p>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a href="datasets.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-primary">Browse All Datasets</a>
<a href="integrated-resources.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Integrated Resources</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Explore by Omics Layer</a>
<a href="use-cases.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Browse by Use Case</a>
<a href="verification-queue.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Verification Queue</a>
<a href="orchestrator.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Orchestrator</a>
<a href="curation-methods.qmd" class="btn-hero btn-outline">Curation Methods</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="metrics-grid">
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-value">86</div>
<div class="metric-label">Primary Datasets</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-value">10</div>
<div class="metric-label">Integrated Resources</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-value">15</div>
<div class="metric-label">Repositories</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-card">
<div class="metric-value">8</div>
<div class="metric-label">Primary Sections</div>
</div>
</div>

<p class="metrics-note">Primary dataset counts are derived from the current dataset CSV. Integrated resources are tracked separately because they combine, curate, or reprocess multiple source datasets.</p>

---

## Scope

This explorer aims to map **publicly indexed IBD omics datasets** across all major omics layers. The focus is on datasets derived from human subjects with inflammatory bowel disease (Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, or IBD-unclassified), or from non-IBD controls used in IBD research contexts. Datasets may include tissue biopsies, blood, stool, organoids, or other relevant specimen types.

**Inclusion does not imply that a dataset is fully reusable, high quality, or suitable for any particular analysis.** The registry documents what is publicly accessible, along with known caveats and limitations.

See the [Curation Methods](curation-methods.qmd) page for detailed inclusion criteria, data access definitions, and metadata caveats.

## Data Layers Covered

<div class="feature-grid">
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#bulk-transcriptomics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🧬</span>
<h3>Bulk Transcriptomics</h3>
<p>Tissue- and blood-level gene expression from microarray and RNA-seq platforms</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#single-cell-transcriptomics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🔬</span>
<h3>Single-Cell Transcriptomics</h3>
<p>Cell-type and cell-state resolution expression in IBD tissues</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#spatial-transcriptomics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🗺️</span>
<h3>Spatial Transcriptomics</h3>
<p>Spatially resolved gene expression preserving tissue architecture</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#microbiome" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🦠</span>
<h3>Microbiome / Metagenomics</h3>
<p>Gut microbial community profiling via shotgun metagenomics and metatranscriptomics</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#proteomics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🧪</span>
<h3>Proteomics / Metaproteomics</h3>
<p>Mucosal and fecal proteomics, including host and microbial proteins</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#metabolomics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">⚗️</span>
<h3>Metabolomics / Lipidomics</h3>
<p>Small-molecule profiling in stool, blood, and tissue</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#methylation" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🔖</span>
<h3>Methylation / Epigenomics</h3>
<p>DNA methylation arrays and chromatin accessibility in blood and mucosa</p>
</a>
<a href="omics-layers.qmd#genetics" class="feature-card">
<span class="feature-icon">🧩</span>
<h3>Genetics / GWAS</h3>
<p>IBD GWAS summary statistics and individual-level genotype resources</p>
</a>
</div>

---

## Navigating the Registry

| Page | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [Datasets](datasets.qmd) | Searchable and filterable table of all indexed datasets |
| [Omics Layers](omics-layers.qmd) | Inventory grouped by omics type with layer-level notes |
| [Repositories](repositories.qmd) | Overview of archives and portals hosting IBD omics data |
| [Use Cases](use-cases.qmd) | Browse datasets tagged as potentially relevant to specific research questions |
| [Verification Queue](verification-queue.qmd) | Review source-check status, citation evidence, and metadata gaps |
| [Orchestrator](orchestrator.qmd) | Track active improvement tasks, missing-resource audits, and next curation priorities |
| [Curation Methods](curation-methods.qmd) | Inclusion criteria, access definitions, metadata caveats |
| [About](about.qmd) | Project context and contact information |

---

<div class="disclaimer">
**Disclaimer.** This website is a curated research tool. It is intended to support dataset discovery, not to serve as a complete or authoritative registry. Dataset availability, metadata accuracy, and access status should be verified independently before analysis. This site does not rank datasets or endorse any particular resource over another.
</div>
